patterns: what does X mean in Y
response_hint: User wants a translation. Identify the source text and target language, then provide the translation with pronunciation if helpful.
User wants to initiate a video call. Guide them to tap the camera icon or use the Calls tab.
Audio issue. Check mic permissions first, then suggest switching speaker output or rejoining the call. On iOS mic is re-requested each session.
User has a privacy concern. Confirm end-to-end encryption for calls and messages, explain data retention policy, and direct to privacy policy if needed.
User is asking about cultural norms. Pull from the culture knowledge layer for the relevant country or region.
